## Discussion

If the extension cannot access the page—for example, the extension has web access permissions set to `None` in the Info.plist—the properties object passed to the completion handler is `nil`. See [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariPageProperties].

# getPropertiesWithCompletionHandler(_:)

**Instance Method**

Retrieves the properties of the webpage.

## Declaration

```swift
func getPropertiesWithCompletionHandler(_ completionHandler: @escaping (SFSafariPageProperties?) -> Void)
```

```swift
func properties() async -> SFSafariPageProperties?
```

## Parameters

- **completionHandler**: A block to call when the properties object is returned.

## Discussion



If the extension cannot access the page—for example, the extension has web access permissions set to `None` in the Info.plist—the properties object passed to the completion handler is `nil`. See [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariPageProperties].
title: getPropertiesWithCompletionHandler(_:)
